description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build that runs on pull requests and pushes to master or tags matching v*. The workflow has four jobs: win32, winstore, mingw, and winmvsc, all running on windows-latest. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, and performs a build. The win32 and winstore jobs upload artifacts and create releases. The mingw job uses a matrix strategy to build with different msys2 environments. The winmvsc job installs Qt and uses Visual Studio shell.
